title: stelis moniligera
intro: Stelis moniligera, also known as the orchid tree, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of Stelis moniligera include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Stelis moniligera can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
